column1: # Class identity: living temple; body and resonance as one; between-stance mastery; meditation-forged strikes
# Existing cards: 10 L1, 0 L2, 0 L3, 2 L5, 0 L9, 1 L20 capstone

column3: Root into a chosen tile; while you do not move, incoming shove and displacement are refused and your IRON checks take advantage.
Strike the air; a low resonant tone rolls out and one enemy within earshot loses their reaction until the start of their next turn.
Once per combat, inhale the stillness you have gathered and refresh one spent defense or reaction card.
Adopt the first form taught at the temple; gain a standing bonus to RESONANCE checks and your unarmed strikes count as blessed until you move more than one tile.

column1: # Strict Iron Temple discipline. Traditional form-work. Ritual, repetition, doctrine.

column3: Cycle through the canonical forms; if you played an attack last turn, the next attack this turn reads as a different damage type of your choice.
A textbook-perfect blow delivered exactly as the founders wrote it; on a hit, the target cannot play reaction cards against you until end of round.
Take the vow for one round; you may not speak or cast, but you cannot be mentally influenced and your IRON defense hardens.
Invoke temple authority; one ally within sight who can see you gains your IRON stance bonus until your next turn.

column1: # Heterodox monks. Resonance over ritual. Feel the tone, break the form.

column3: Strike a note no scripture allows; one object, shield, or brittle construct within sight cracks along a resonant seam.
Invent a form on the spot; this turn your movement does not provoke and your unarmed strikes gain advantage on the first hit.
Attune to another body in the fight; until your next turn, when that creature takes damage you may hear its position through walls and gain a free mark on it.
Sing the forbidden triad; enemies within earshot that rely on spoken incantations lose one card from their next turn's pool.

column1: # Body-integrated monks. Augmentation as devotion. The temple is the flesh.

column3: Press a living augment into your knuckle before the strike; your next unarmed attack deals augment damage and ignores one point of armor.
Open an old mark and close it with a prayer; spend a hit die and gain temporary protection equal to the roll until end of combat.
Lock your skeleton into prayer posture; until your next turn, the first attack that would knock you prone or stagger you is refused.
Your body stores a relic's hum; once per combat, discharge it to end one ongoing effect on yourself or an adjacent ally.

column1: # ===== L3 SUBCLASS: PATH OF THE BETWEEN (4) =====
# Walkers in the space between stances. Transitional mastery. Exist in the gap.

column3: Between one breath and the next, change your footing; after any enemy's movement ends adjacent to you, shift one tile before they act.
Walk the gap; become untargetable until the start of your next turn, but you cannot act while hollow.
Strike from the stance you have not yet taken; your next attack this turn hits as though you had moved, whether or not you did.
For a breath, you exist in two places; until end of turn, you may count as standing in your current tile or any tile adjacent to it for line-of-sight and cover.
Release a cascade of resonant tones across the battlefield; every enemy within a wide radius takes resonant damage and their next concentration check is made at disadvantage.
Speak aloud the unbroken lineage; for one round, you and allies within earshot cannot be charmed, frightened, or compelled, and your first attack each turn is blessed.
Execute the technique forbidden outside the high temple; one perfect strike that cannot be dodged, parried, or reacted to, but you may not attack again this combat.
Find the hidden resonant channel in a living target; the next attack against them this round is maximized, and you hear their heartbeat for the rest of combat.
Loose every tone you have swallowed; all enemies within sight take resonant damage and must drop one held card or spent item.
Offer your flesh as a relic; until end of combat, every time you take damage, an ally within sight heals for the same amount.
Fuse briefly with an adjacent ally's augments; until end of your next turn, you share defense values and each of you may use one of the other's cards once.

column1: # ===== L9 SUBCLASS POWER: PATH OF THE BETWEEN (2) =====

column3: Begin a step you never complete; choose a tile within sight, and until the start of your next turn you are considered to be in both your current tile and that tile for all purposes.
Strike in the instant between two heartbeats; resolve an attack against any target in sight before any other action this round, ignoring turn order.
